title: From #general
headline: Hi team Thursday, June 4th, is a public holiday in Poland (Corpus Christi / Boże...
quote: Hi team Thursday, June 4th, is a public holiday in Poland (Corpus Christi / Boże Ciało), so it will be an official day off for the Polish office! Please keep this in mind when planning your work
author: Iryna Peretiatko
